title: Innovative Crisp Jamaican Coconut Dumplings
description: A yeasty and adventurous Jamaican dish featuring nuts and coconut, perfect for a snack or dessert, this egg-free friendly treat is served on a lazy-susan-spinner.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, coconut flakes, yeast, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, mix together coconut oil and water.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Once the oil is hot, drop the dough by tablespoonfuls into the oil and fry until golden brown.
Remove the dumplings from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Sprinkle the dumplings with chopped pecans and serve warm on a lazy-susan-spinner.
